rule_text: OPEN TENDER (public advertisement) is mandatory for AP Stores procurement whenever the estimated value of the order is Rs.5.00 lakh OR MORE (post 8-12-2008 amendment via GO Ms No 489); for orders > Rs.5 lakh, only a small advertisement need go in newspaper with full details on the website (lengthy newspaper ads are to be avoided).
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 125 Rule III Instruction (8) read with GO Ms No 489 / Finance (TFR.I) Dept dated 8-12-2008
verification_method: For Goods >= Rs.5 lakh: tender NIT must be by public advertisement; bare-newspaper-listing + website-link format acceptable

rule_text: SPLITTING of work to remain within the Rs.5 lakh Open Tender limit will be VIEWED SERIOUSLY in AP and action taken; bid-splitting to evade Open Tender mandate is treated as a serious irregularity.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 125 Rule III Instruction (8) Note (added by GO Ms No 489/2008)
verification_method: Audit-level check: aggregate award-value to same vendor in same period for similar items vs Open-Tender threshold

rule_text: LIMITED TENDER system shall ordinarily be adopted for AP Stores when estimated order value is LESS than Rs.5.00 lakh (post 2008 amendment); may also be adopted for orders > Rs.5 lakh in exceptional cases (Instruction 13).
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 125 Rule III Instruction (9) read with GO Ms No 489/2008
verification_method: For Goods < Rs.5 lakh: Limited Tender system permitted; for Open-Tender-mandate (>=Rs.5 lakh) Limited Tender requires recorded justification per Instruction 13

rule_text: SINGLE TENDER (private purchase) system in AP may be adopted for: (a) small orders not exceeding Rs.10,000 in total value (or aggregate where multiple article kinds), OR (b) when articles are of proprietary character with sole agency where competition is not considered necessary.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 125 Rule III Instructions (8)(3) and (11) read with GO Ms No 489/2008
verification_method: For Single Tender: order value <= Rs.10,000 OR proprietary-sole-agency certificate on file with non-competition justification

rule_text: Tenders for AP large stores contracts must allow at least ONE MONTH from the date of advertisement to the date of submission; tenders must be invited in sealed covers and opened by a RESPONSIBLE OFFICER (not by a subordinate).
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 125 Rule III Instruction (8)
verification_method: Check NIT-publication-date to bid-close-date >= 30 days for large contracts; opening minutes show responsible-officer signature

rule_text: AP departments must maintain a list of firms (Indian and foreign) of KNOWN RELIABILITY for Limited Tender and Single Tender procedures; the list must be examined and revised PERIODICALLY; before adding a new firm, the purchasing officer must ascertain whether it can execute contracts satisfactorily.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 125 Rule III Instruction (10)
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType=Goods AND ProcurementMethod IN [LimitedTender, SingleTender]
verification_method: Check approved-firms-list maintenance + periodic review record; new-firm verification trail

rule_text: Materials/stores costing more than Rs.1,00,000 in AP shall be procured through e-procurement platform ONLY (cross-reference: GO Ms No 258/2013) — explicitly incorporated into AP Financial Code Article 125.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 125 Rule III Instruction (8) — GO Ms No 258 / Finance (TFR) Dept dated 20-9-2013
verification_method: Confirms AP-GO-010; for Goods > Rs.1 lakh, tender must originate from apeprocurement.gov.in
